content: {"file": "frontend/storyforge-ui/src/app/pages/review/review.component.ts", "summary": "This component handles the review process for generated stories. It loads story data from a service, displays it in an expandable format, and allows users to approve the reviewed stories.", "rules": [{"name": "Load Stories", "description": "Loads generated stories based on job ID when the component initializes.", "conditions": ["jobId is available"], "actions": ["Call getAssessmentStatus method from StoryForgeService"]}, {"name": "Toggle Expansion", "description": "Toggles the expansion of story details in the UI.", "conditions": ["User clicks on a story card"], "actions": ["Update expandedIndex to show/hide story details"]}, {"name": "Approve Stories", "description": "Submits approval for reviewed stories and navigates to status page upon success or shows an error message if submission fails.", "conditions": ["User clicks approve button"], "actions": ["Call approveReview method from StoryForgeService, navigate to status page on success"]}], "dependencies": ["@angular/common", "@angular/forms", "@angular/router", "../../services/storyforge.service"]}
